topic.what: formal specification and verification of capability-based access control for Byzantine fault-tolerant local-first systems
topic.how: using Verus framework (Rust + Z3 theorem prover) to define authorization semantics, invariants, and verified algorithms for replicated collaboration groups
topic.why_matters: bridges gap between formal methods theory and distributed systems practice; real-world systems like Matrix lack verified authorization despite security-critical deployment

characteristics.what_it_measures: invariance of causal authorization under new events
characteristics.evidence: proved via Verus that authorization safety holds for all valid chronicles
characteristics.context: causal authorization invariant; discursive authorization invariant except for authorized revocations

characteristics.what_it_measures: query results invariant under discursively unauthorized events
characteristics.evidence: proved via Verus that query operations filter only authorized events
characteristics.context: ensured by caps(), authorizes(), values() acting on discursively authorized events only

characteristics.what_it_measures: unauthorized invocations remain unauthorized at earlier timestamps
characteristics.evidence: proved via Verus to prevent Byzantine backdating attacks from circumventing revocations
characteristics.context: enables safe revocation against backdating attacks by extending revocation scope to concurrent events

characteristics.what_it_measures: coverage of formal semantics for group management
characteristics.evidence: step 1: grants before creation only; step 2: grants after creation (monotonic); step 3: revocations after creation (non-monotonic)
characteristics.context: bottom-up approach starting from simple verified algorithms

characteristics.what_it_measures: all functions terminate and yield expected return type
characteristics.evidence: proved totality for spec functions and termination of loops/recursion
characteristics.context: required for latency and fault tolerance of local-first systems

characteristics.what_it_measures: query functions deterministic and side-effect free
characteristics.evidence: proved strong convergence of query results by verifying equality between exec and spec queries
characteristics.context: enables eventual consistency of query results
